title: Create: Trimmed
description: A mod that allows Create's materials to be used as armour trim materials.
body:
# Create: Trimmed
A mod that allows Create's materials to be used as armour trim materials.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zvaHXgQz/images/5835f467e8ad2d18d8203668eade7f216e95f6f1.png)
From left to right, brass, zinc, rose quartz, and ender pearls.

I'm unsure why I added an ender pearl trim when I made this, but that's the way it is, and I'd rather not remove it in case people are actually using it in their worlds.

This mod requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).

Ensure you download the correct version for 1.20.1 or 1.21.1 as datapacks changed significantly between those versions.
